artPrompt: A single coin spins glinting at the apex of its arc, frozen against a blood-dark apocalyptic sky, a vast looming clock tower behind it and ashen-robed congregants below stretching their candlelit hands upward in desperate hope. Cold gold halos catch the rim of the coin. Vertiginous low film-still angle following the toss into the heavens, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Call It in the Air
text: Prophecy (As this resolves, predict heads or tails out loud and flip a coin.) Make a Prophecy. If you predicted correctly, draw two cards and gain 2 life. If you were wrong, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and draw nothing but conclusions.
flavorText: "Heads, we're saved. Tails, well. You know."
